description: Discussion on decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs) featuring various speakers including Stella, Carolyn, and others. Topics include governance, community engagement, and the role of DAOs in the blockchain ecosystem.
topic_summary: Exploration of DAOs and their impact on community and governance [t=00:00-01:00]. Key insights from speakers like Carolyn and Hari Chiang on the future of decentralized organizations [t=12:00-29:00].
